mapper.sql: select id, third_party_pk, customer, sheet_je, dh, supno, sup, ckno, ck, ksbh, ksmc, bz, jsfs, receive_channel, scm_sup_code, scm_hospital_code, scm_hospital_id, scm_supplier_id, zjly, create_time, hospital_id, supplier_id, confirm_status, confirm_by, confirm_by_name_snapshot, confirm_time, void_status, void_by, void_by_name_snapshot, void_time, null as hospital_code, null as hospital_name, null as supplier_code, null as supplier_name, null as delivery_progress from zs_tp_order

select z.id, z.third_party_pk, z.customer, z.sheet_je, z.dh, z.supno, z.sup, z.ckno, z.ck, z.ksbh, z.ksmc, z.bz, z.jsfs, z.receive_channel, z.scm_sup_code, z.scm_hospital_code, z.scm_hospital_id, z.scm_supplier_id, z.zjly, z.create_time, z.hospital_id, z.supplier_id, z.confirm_status, z.confirm_by, z.confirm_by_name_snapshot, z.confirm_time, z.void_status, z.void_by, z.void_by_name_snapshot, z.void_time, null as hospital_code, null as hospital_name, null as supplier_code, null as supplier_name, null as delivery_progress from zs_tp_order z

(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(IFNULL(dd.delivery_quantity, 0)), 0) FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0') WHERE (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') AND ( dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r WHERE r.order_detail_id = l.id AND r.delivery_detail_id = ) ))

EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail l WHERE l.order_id = z.id AND (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0') WHERE (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') AND dd.zs_order_detail_id = l.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r INNER JOIN scm_delivery_detail dd ON r.delivery_detail_id = INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0') WHERE r.order_detail_id = l.id AND (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') ) ) )

SELECT t.line_id, SUM(t.qty) AS delivered_qty FROM ( SELECT dd.zs_order_detail_id AS line_id, IFNULL(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) AS qty FROM scm_delivery_detail dd INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0') WHERE (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') AND dd.zs_order_detail_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(dd.zs_order_detail_id) <> '' UNION ALL SELECT r.order_detail_id AS line_id, IFNULL(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) AS qty FROM zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r INNER JOIN scm_delivery_detail dd ON r.delivery_detail_id = INNER JOIN scm_delivery d ON d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '0') WHERE (dd.del_flag IS NULL OR dd.del_flag = '' OR dd.del_flag = '0') ) t GROUP BY t.line_id

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT l.order_id, SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(l.sl, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt_lines, SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(l.sl, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(ld.delivered_qty, 0) >= IFNULL(l.sl, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt_done, MAX(CASE WHEN IFNULL(ld.delivered_qty, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_del FROM zs_tp_order_detail l LEFT JOIN (
) ld ON ld.line_id = l.id WHERE (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') GROUP BY l.order_id ) zprog ON zprog.order_id = z.id
CASE WHEN IFNULL(zprog.cnt_lines, 0) = 0 THEN 'none' WHEN zprog.cnt_lines = zprog.cnt_done THEN 'done' WHEN IFNULL(zprog.has_del, 0) = 1 THEN 'partial' ELSE 'none' END

( CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail l WHERE l.order_id = z.id AND (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') AND IFNULL(l.sl, 0) > 0 AND < IFNULL(l.sl, 0) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail l2 WHERE l2.order_id = z.id AND (l2.del_flag IS NULL OR l2.del_flag = '' OR l2.del_flag = '0') AND IFNULL(l2.sl, 0) > 0 ) THEN 'done' WHEN AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM zs_tp_order_detail l WHERE l.order_id = z.id AND (l.del_flag IS NULL OR l.del_flag = '' OR l.del_flag = '0') AND IFNULL(l.sl, 0) > 0 AND < IFNULL(l.sl, 0) ) THEN 'partial' ELSE 'none' END )

z.id, z.third_party_pk, z.customer, z.sheet_je, z.dh, z.supno, z.sup, z.ckno, z.ck, z.ksbh, z.ksmc, z.bz, z.jsfs, z.receive_channel, z.scm_sup_code, z.scm_hospital_code, z.scm_hospital_id, z.scm_supplier_id, z.zjly, z.create_time, z.hospital_id, z.supplier_id, z.confirm_status, z.confirm_by, z.confirm_time, z.void_status, z.void_by, z.void_time, z.confirm_by_name_snapshot, z.void_by_name_snapshot, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(z.confirm_by_name_snapshot), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(confirmer.real_name), ''), z.confirm_by) as confirm_by_display, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(z.void_by_name_snapshot), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(voider.real_name), ''), z.void_by) as void_by_display, COALESCE(nullif(trim(h.hospital_code), ''), nullif(trim(z.scm_hospital_code), '')) as hospital_code, h.hospital_name, COALESCE(nullif(trim(s.supplier_code), ''), nullif(trim(z.scm_sup_code), '')) as supplier_code, COALESCE(nullif(trim(s.company_name), ''), nullif(trim(z.sup), '')) as supplier_name, as delivery_progress

z.id, z.third_party_pk, z.customer, z.sheet_je, z.dh, z.supno, z.sup, z.ckno, z.ck, z.ksbh, z.ksmc, z.bz, z.jsfs, z.receive_channel, z.scm_sup_code, z.scm_hospital_code, z.scm_hospital_id, z.scm_supplier_id, z.zjly, z.create_time, z.hospital_id, z.supplier_id, z.confirm_status, z.confirm_by, z.confirm_time, z.void_status, z.void_by, z.void_time, z.confirm_by_name_snapshot, z.void_by_name_snapshot, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(z.confirm_by_name_snapshot), ''), z.confirm_by) as confirm_by_display, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(z.void_by_name_snapshot), ''), z.void_by) as void_by_display, COALESCE(nullif(trim(h.hospital_code), ''), nullif(trim(z.scm_hospital_code), '')) as hospital_code, h.hospital_name, COALESCE(nullif(trim(s.supplier_code), ''), nullif(trim(z.scm_sup_code), '')) as supplier_code, COALESCE(nullif(trim(s.company_name), ''), nullif(trim(z.sup), '')) as supplier_name, as delivery_progress
from zs_tp_order z left join scm_hospital h on h.hospital_id = left join scm_supplier s on s.supplier_id =

from zs_tp_order z left join scm_hospital h on h.hospital_id = left join scm_supplier s on s.supplier_id = left join sys_user confirmer on (confirmer.del_flag = '0' or confirmer.del_flag is null or confirmer.del_flag = '') and (confirmer.login_name = z.confirm_by or confirmer.user_name = z.confirm_by or cast(confirmer.user_id as char) = z.confirm_by) left join sys_user voider on (voider.del_flag = '0' or voider.del_flag is null or voider.del_flag = '') and (voider.login_name = z.void_by or voider.user_name = z.void_by or cast(voider.user_id as char) = z.void_by)

if.test: params != null and params.tpConfirmStatus != null and params.tpConfirmStatus != ''
params != null and params.tpVoidStatus != null and params.tpVoidStatus != ''
params != null and params.excludeHospitalIds != null and params.excludeHospitalIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.roleSupplierIds != null and params.roleSupplierIds.size() > 0
params != null and params.scopePairBlock != null and (params.scopePairBlock == true or params.scopePairBlock == 'true')
params != null and params.scopePairs != null and params.scopePairs.size() > 0
params != null and params.pushBegin != null and params.pushBegin != ''
params != null and params.pushEnd != null and params.pushEnd != ''

sql.if: and ( IFNULL(h.hospital_code, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or IFNULL(h.hospital_name, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or IFNULL(h.hospital_short_name, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or LOWER(IFNULL(h.pinyin_code, '')) like concat('%', LOWER(#{hospitalKeyword}), '%') or IFNULL(z.scm_hospital_code, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') )

and ( IFNULL(s.supplier_code, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or IFNULL(s.company_name, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or IFNULL(s.company_short_name, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or LOWER(IFNULL(s.pinyin_code, '')) like concat('%', LOWER(#{supplierKeyword}), '%') or IFNULL(z.scm_sup_code, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') )

if.test: params != null and params.deliveryFilter != null and params.deliveryFilter == 'none'
params != null and params.deliveryFilter != null and params.deliveryFilter == 'partial'

sql.if: and and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and (l.del_flag is null or l.del_flag = '' or l.del_flag = '0') and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and < ifnull(l.sl, 0) )

if.test: params != null and params.deliveryFilter != null and params.deliveryFilter == 'done'

sql.if: and not exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and (l.del_flag is null or l.del_flag = '' or l.del_flag = '0') and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and < ifnull(l.sl, 0) ) and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l2 where l2.order_id = z.id and (l2.del_flag is null or l2.del_flag = '' or l2.del_flag = '0') and ifnull(l2.sl, 0) > 0 )

choose.when: and IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(z.void_status), ''), '0') = '0' and and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and (l.del_flag is null or l.del_flag = '' or l.del_flag = '0') and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and < ifnull(l.sl, 0) )

and IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(z.void_status), ''), '0') = '0' and not exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l where l.order_id = z.id and (l.del_flag is null or l.del_flag = '' or l.del_flag = '0') and ifnull(l.sl, 0) > 0 and < ifnull(l.sl, 0) ) and exists ( select 1 from zs_tp_order_detail l2 where l2.order_id = z.id and (l2.del_flag is null or l2.del_flag = '' or l2.del_flag = '0') and ifnull(l2.sl, 0) > 0 )

mapper.sql:
z.del_flag = '0'
and z.dh like concat('%', #{dh}, '%')
and z.customer like concat('%', #{customer}, '%')
and z.ksmc like concat('%', #{ksmc}, '%')

z.del_flag = '0'
and (z.void_status is null or z.void_status = '' or z.void_status = '0')
and z.dh like concat('%', #{dh}, '%')
and z.customer like concat('%', #{customer}, '%')
and z.ksmc like concat('%', #{ksmc}, '%')
mapper.select: select id, order_id, third_party_pk, dh, code, name, gg, dw, bzl, sccj, zcz, phflag, sl, dj, je, jm, cgj, bz, bz1, bz2, dsb from zs_tp_order_detail where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' order by create_time

select distinct l.order_id from zs_tp_order_detail l where (l.del_flag is null or l.del_flag = '' or l.del_flag = '0') and l.order_id is not null and trim(l.order_id) != '' and l.id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update zs_tp_order set confirm_status = '1', confirm_by = #{confirmBy}, confirm_by_name_snapshot = #{confirmByNameSnapshot}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, update_by = #{confirmBy}, update_time = #{confirmTime} where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0' and (void_status is null or void_status = '' or void_status = '0') and (confirm_status is null or confirm_status = '' or confirm_status = '0')

update zs_tp_order set void_status = '1', void_by = #{voidBy}, void_by_name_snapshot = #{voidByNameSnapshot}, void_time = #{voidTime}, update_by = #{voidBy}, update_time = #{voidTime} where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0' and (void_status is null or void_status = '' or void_status = '0')
